Text.Name: Lv0
Text.Desc: Beginner: In this difficulty you can cultivate just like a windy walk. Mortal things will not interrupt your journey, meanwhile work and cultivation speed are highly improved. No enemy envasion, no extreme weather, easy to play.

Text.Name: Lv1
Text.Desc: Normal: Classic mormal difficulty, and it is suitable for players who already have some knowledge of this game. All events will happen normally. Work and cultivation are at normal speed.

Text.Name: Lv2
Text.Desc: Sage: This difficulty is hard, and is for players who are very familiar with this game. You can challenge yourself in the Immortal mode, which contains full game experience. The immortal mode test players of their extreme skills, and only suits real immortals. Some achievements can only be accomplished in the Immortal mode.
